description_long: This is a black baseball cap featuring a structured, rounded crown and a slightly curved brim. The front panel is adorned with a large, raised white 'S' logo flanked by two embroidered white birds, adding a distinctive urban flair. The cap appears to be made primarily of fabric, likely cotton or a cotton blend, with visible stitching along the seams and brim. On the left side, there are two white claw-mark style embroidered accents, contributing to its streetwear aesthetic. The back of the cap is plain, with no visible adjustment strap, suggesting a fitted or flex-fit style. The overall finish is matte, with a soft, slightly textured surface typical of casual headwear.
description: Black baseball cap with a white 'S' logo and bird embroidery on the front, plus claw-mark accents on the side. Matte fabric with a structured crown and curved brim.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the two white claw-mark embroidery accents and the cap's curved brim.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large white 'S' logo and two embroidered birds on the crown.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the bird embroidery and the smooth, uninterrupted crown surface.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain back of the cap with no visible adjustment strap.
